# Ratio

Ratio is a social album review and rating app for discovering albums, reading community reviews, and sharing profile and review pages.

## Important Pages

- [Home feed](https://ratiomusic.live/)
- [Sitemap](https://ratiomusic.live/sitemap.xml)

## Public Route Patterns

- Album pages: /album/:spotifyId
- Review permalinks: /review/:reviewId
- User profiles: /user/:username
